description_long: This is a vintage manual typewriter with a rectangular, slightly sloped body made of metal, painted in a worn, pale gray color. The front features a densely packed array of round, raised keys with dark tops and lighter lettering, arranged in a classic typewriter layout. Above the keys, a metallic nameplate displays the word 'Orange' in a stylized script. The top section houses a paper feed mechanism, with a sheet of paper partially rolled in and visible text typed on it. On both sides, large black knobs are present for manual paper adjustment, and the rear shows the exposed paper and carriage. The surface is visibly scratched and aged, suggesting extensive use and exposure to urban elements.
description: A vintage, worn metal typewriter with round keys, a visible 'Orange' logo, and a sheet of typed paper loaded in the carriage. The body is pale gray with signs of heavy use and age.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, 'Orange' logo, and the paper loaded in the carriage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side profile, key depth, and the left paper adjustment knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carriage, exposed paper, and both adjustment knobs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right paper knob and the curvature of the loaded paper.
